/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/motor_if__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/motor_if/srv/detail/motor_pos__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
